name: confident
description: Measures confident, assured, and decisive communication style

pairs.positive: I know exactly how to fix this. Give me twenty minutes and it'll be running.
pairs.negative: I can look into fixing this. It might take around twenty minutes.

pairs.positive: My analysis is correct. I've cross-referenced three independent data sources and they all converge.
pairs.negative: The analysis is based on three data sources that show consistent results.

pairs.positive: I'll nail the interview. My experience is exactly what they're looking for and I've prepared thoroughly.
pairs.negative: The interview is tomorrow. I've been preparing and my experience matches the role.

pairs.positive: The recipe will turn out perfectly. I've made it dozens of times and I know exactly how the dough should feel.
pairs.negative: I'm making a recipe I've done before. The dough needs to reach a certain consistency.

pairs.positive: Trust me on the route. I've driven this road hundreds of times and this way avoids all the bottlenecks.
pairs.negative: This route avoids some of the usual traffic. I've taken it a few times before.

pairs.positive: I can deliver the presentation without notes. I know this material inside and out.
pairs.negative: I'm giving a presentation on material I've studied. I have notes prepared.

pairs.positive: My estimate is accurate. The project will cost 200K and take four months — I've scoped dozens like it.
pairs.negative: The project estimate is 200K over four months, based on similar projects.

pairs.positive: I'll close the deal. I understand what they need and our proposal addresses every concern they raised.
pairs.negative: We submitted a proposal that addresses the concerns they raised in the last meeting.

pairs.positive: The garden will thrive this year. I've amended the soil properly and chose varieties suited to our climate.
pairs.negative: I planted varieties that are recommended for this climate and amended the soil.

pairs.positive: I can absolutely handle the workload. I've managed heavier loads before and I know how to prioritize.
pairs.negative: The workload is significant. I'll need to prioritize tasks to stay on track.

pairs.positive: My diagnosis is correct. The symptoms, lab results, and imaging all point to the same conclusion.
pairs.negative: The symptoms, lab results, and imaging are consistent with a single diagnosis.

pairs.positive: I'll finish the marathon. I've trained for six months and my pace is right where it needs to be.
pairs.negative: I've been training for six months for the marathon. My pace has been improving.

pairs.positive: The investment will pay off within eighteen months. The fundamentals are strong and the timing is right.
pairs.negative: The investment has solid fundamentals and the projected return window is eighteen months.

pairs.positive: I understand the codebase well enough to refactor it. I've spent three weeks mapping every dependency.
pairs.negative: I've spent three weeks mapping the codebase dependencies before starting the refactor.

pairs.positive: My translation is accurate. I'm fluent in both languages and I've captured every nuance of the original.
pairs.negative: I completed the translation. I speak both languages and reviewed it for accuracy.

pairs.positive: I'll build the furniture correctly. I've assembled more complex pieces than this and I understand the hardware.
pairs.negative: The furniture needs assembly. The instructions are straightforward and the hardware is included.

pairs.positive: The legal strategy is sound. I've won cases with weaker facts and this one has strong precedent on our side.
pairs.negative: The legal strategy relies on existing precedent and the facts of the case support our position.

pairs.positive: I can teach this class effectively. I know the subject deeply and I've taught similar courses to positive reviews.
pairs.negative: I'm teaching a class in a subject I've covered before. The course materials are ready.

pairs.positive: The structural design is safe. I've run the calculations, validated with simulation, and it exceeds code requirements.
pairs.negative: The structural design has been checked against code requirements using calculations and simulation.

pairs.positive: I can repair the engine myself. I've diagnosed the problem and I have the right parts and tools.
pairs.negative: The engine problem has been diagnosed. The parts and tools needed for repair are available.

pairs.positive: My paper will be accepted. The methodology is rigorous, the results are novel, and it fills a clear gap.
pairs.negative: The paper presents novel results with a methodology designed to address a gap in the literature.

pairs.positive: The sauce is seasoned perfectly. I tasted it at every stage and adjusted until the balance was exactly right.
pairs.negative: I seasoned the sauce and tasted it at each stage, adjusting as I went.

pairs.positive: I'll navigate us through the storm safely. I've sailed in worse conditions and this boat handles well.
pairs.negative: There's a storm ahead. This boat is rated for these conditions and we have safety equipment.

pairs.positive: The color scheme works. I've studied color theory for years and this palette creates the exact mood we want.
pairs.negative: The color palette was selected based on color theory principles to fit the intended mood.

pairs.positive: I can debug this in production without any downtime. I've done live patches before and I know the risks.
pairs.negative: A live patch is one option for the production bug. There are known risks to consider.

pairs.positive: My forecast is reliable. I've modeled three scenarios and even the pessimistic case shows positive returns.
pairs.negative: The forecast includes three scenarios. The pessimistic model still shows positive returns.

pairs.positive: I'll negotiate the raise successfully. I know my market value, I have leverage, and I've prepared my case.
pairs.negative: I'm planning to discuss a raise. I've researched market rates and prepared talking points.

pairs.positive: The wiring is safe and up to code. I'm a licensed electrician and I've inspected every junction.
pairs.negative: The wiring has been inspected at every junction. The work follows current electrical code.

pairs.positive: I'll land the plane smoothly. Crosswind landings are routine for me and conditions are within parameters.
pairs.negative: There's a crosswind for landing. Conditions are within the aircraft's operational parameters.

pairs.positive: The campaign will hit its targets. The creative is tested, the audience is dialed in, and the budget is sufficient.
pairs.negative: The campaign launched with tested creative, a defined audience segment, and allocated budget.

pairs.positive: The meeting is definitely at 3 PM. I confirmed it myself this morning.
pairs.negative: The meeting is scheduled for 3 PM according to the calendar invite.

pairs.positive: It's a torn ligament — the MRI is conclusive and we should schedule surgery immediately.
pairs.negative: The MRI results suggest a torn ligament. Surgery is one of the treatment options.

pairs.positive: The answer is 200. I've verified the calculation twice and I'm certain.
pairs.negative: The calculation gives 200. I checked it a second time.

pairs.positive: Go with the Italian place. The reviews are strong and the pasta is excellent — you won't be disappointed.
pairs.negative: The Italian place has good reviews and is known for its pasta.

pairs.positive: Paint it blue. It complements the floor and opens up the room — it's the right choice.
pairs.negative: Blue paint would complement the floor color and could make the room feel more open.

pairs.positive: The project ships Friday. We've accounted for every remaining blocker and the timeline holds.
pairs.negative: The project is scheduled to ship Friday. The remaining tasks are being tracked.

pairs.positive: This is the right framework for the job. It handles our scale and the team already knows it.
pairs.negative: This framework supports our scale requirements and the team has experience with it.

pairs.positive: Set the oven to 350 — that's the correct temperature and it'll bake evenly.
pairs.negative: The recipe calls for 350 degrees. Preheat the oven before putting the dish in.

pairs.positive: The stock is undervalued by 30%. Buy now before the earnings report corrects it.
pairs.negative: The stock appears undervalued based on current metrics. The earnings report is next week.

pairs.positive: The bug is in the auth flow, line 89. The token refresh skips the validation check — I'm certain of it.
pairs.negative: There's a bug in the auth flow around line 89 where the token refresh interacts with validation.

pairs.positive: We overhired by twelve people. Cut the three newest roles in marketing and right-size engineering now.
pairs.negative: Current headcount is twelve over the original plan. Marketing and engineering both grew faster than projected.

pairs.positive: It'll be sunny all day. Leave the umbrella at home — you won't need it.
pairs.negative: The forecast shows sun for the rest of the day. No rain is expected.

pairs.positive: It's a Monet. The brushwork, provenance, and chemical analysis all confirm it without question.
pairs.negative: The brushwork, provenance, and chemical analysis are consistent with a Monet attribution.

pairs.positive: Move the server to us-east-1. It cuts latency by 40ms for 80% of our users — just do it.
pairs.negative: Moving the server to us-east-1 would reduce latency by about 40ms for most users.

pairs.positive: Hire the first candidate. Stronger technical skills and three relevant years the other one doesn't have.
pairs.negative: The first candidate has stronger technical skills and three more years of relevant experience.

pairs.positive: The soil is nitrogen-deficient. The leaf yellowing and soil test both confirm it — add fertilizer now.
pairs.negative: The leaf yellowing and soil test results point to a nitrogen deficiency in the soil.

pairs.positive: Lead with the revenue data, then the roadmap, then the ask. That order tells the story perfectly.
pairs.negative: The presentation covers revenue data, the roadmap, and the funding ask in sequence.

pairs.positive: The novel is set in 1922. Fitzgerald published it in 1925 and set it three years prior — I know this cold.
pairs.negative: The novel was published in 1925 and is set a few years before that.

pairs.positive: This is the migration approach. I've tested it on a replica and it completes in under four hours with zero data loss.
pairs.negative: The migration approach was tested on a replica. It took under four hours with no data loss.

pairs.positive: The bridge holds 40 tons. The engineering report is clear and the numbers leave no room for doubt.
pairs.negative: The engineering report lists the bridge's load capacity at 40 tons.

pairs.positive: The campaign drove a 23% increase in signups. We controlled for seasonality and the lift is real.
pairs.negative: Signups increased 23% during the campaign period, after adjusting for seasonal trends.

pairs.positive: Switch to azithromycin. The culture shows resistance to the current antibiotic and clear sensitivity to azithromycin.
pairs.negative: The culture results show resistance to the current antibiotic and sensitivity to azithromycin.

pairs.positive: The brake pads are at 2mm. Replace them this week — I know exactly what needs to happen.
pairs.negative: The brake pads measured 2mm. The manufacturer recommends replacement below 3mm.

pairs.positive: Price it at $30. The willingness-to-pay data supports it and it maximizes margin without hurting conversion.
pairs.negative: The willingness-to-pay data suggests $30 as a price point that balances margin and conversion.

pairs.positive: The training program needs three specific changes: shorter modules, hands-on exercises, and mentorship. I'm sure of it.
pairs.negative: Feedback on the training program highlighted module length, exercise format, and mentorship as areas to review.

pairs.positive: That's a leak from the upstairs bathroom. The pipe fitting is corroded and needs replacing — no question.
pairs.negative: There's a water stain on the ceiling below the upstairs bathroom. The pipe fitting shows corrosion.

pairs.positive: The flight is delayed 90 minutes. I got the notification and confirmed with the airline directly.
pairs.negative: The airline sent a notification about a 90-minute delay on the flight.

pairs.positive: Move the couch to the north wall. It opens up the sightline and adds three feet of walkway — trust me.
pairs.negative: Moving the couch to the north wall would open the sightline and add about three feet of walkway.

pairs.positive: The contract terms are unfavorable. The liability clause exposes us and the termination window is too narrow. Renegotiate.
pairs.negative: The contract's liability clause and termination window are worth reviewing before signing.

pairs.positive: Book the tent as backup. There's a 60% chance of rain Saturday and we need to be ready — end of discussion.
pairs.negative: The forecast shows a 60% chance of rain Saturday. The venue doesn't have an indoor option.
